title: Biome notifier
description: mod that shows a clean biome notification whenever you enter a new biome
body:
# Biome Notification
**No need for the F3 debug screen.**

This is just a simple client-side mod that shows a notification whenever you enter a new biome. It's useful if you like exploring without having the debug screen open all the time.

![In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a9051d652b016f2b55900ef25b18f344f8b1b2b_0.webp)

### Features
* **Looks Vanilla:** The text style fits right in with the normal game UI.
* **Client-Side:** You can use this on any server (even vanilla ones) without asking admins.
* **Customizable:** You can change the screen position, color, and how long the message stays up.
* **Mod Support:** Works automatically with modded biomes like Terralith.
